nasb.text: A man’s foot will not pass through it, and the foot of a beast will not pass through it, and it will not be inhabited for forty years.

esv.text: No foot of man shall pass through it, and no foot of beast shall pass through it; it shall be uninhabited forty years.

cnv.text: 人的腳必不經過那裡，獸的蹄也不經過那裡；四十年之久，無人居住。

ccb.text: 四十年之内，这里必无人居住，人兽踪迹灭绝。
